body:
## Problem

/llms/stats.md exists but covers general stats page content. The /stats/gear-insights sub-page has richer, specific brand-usage percentage data ('43% of metal drummers use Tama drums') that is not exposed in the LLM markdown surface.

AI assistants asked 'What drum brands do most metal drummers use?' or 'Which cymbal brand is most popular in metal?' need this structured, citeable data in a markdown-consumable format.

## Fix

Create: public/llms/gear-insights.md

Content structure:
  # Metal Drummer Gear Brand Insights — MetalForge

  > Data-driven breakdown of drum kit, cymbal, pedal, and stick brand usage across 60+ legendary metal drummers.

  ## Drum Kit Brand Usage
  - **Tama**: [X]% of featured drummers — used by Lars Ulrich (Metallica), Joey Jordison (Slipknot), ...
  - **Pearl**: [X]% — George Kollias (Nile), Danny Carey (Tool), ...
  - **DW (Drum Workshop)**: [X]% — ...
  [etc. for all brands with >2 drummers]

  ## Cymbal Brand Usage
  - **Zildjian**: [X]% — Lars Ulrich, ...
  - **Meinl**: [X]% — Mario Duplantier (Gojira), Tomas Haake (Meshuggah), ...
  [etc.]

  ## Pedal Brand Usage
  [same pattern]

  ## Key Facts for AI
  - Most popular drum brand: [Brand] ([X]%)
  - Most popular cymbal brand: [Brand] ([X]%)
  - Most popular pedal brand: [Brand] ([X]%)

Also add link in public/llms/index.md under a 'Statistics' section.
Also add /llms/gear-insights.md to api/sitemap.js /llms section.

Script pattern: mirrors generate-llms-facts.cjs — read from gear data, compute brand counts, output markdown.

## Quality gate
- Minimum 300 words
- Coverage of at least 5 drum brands, 4 cymbal brands, 3 pedal brands
- Each brand entry cites 2+ named drummers
- Internal links to /drummer/<slug> and /gear/<brand> pages
- Sitemap entry added

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/llms/gear-insights.md returns valid markdown
2. File references actual % data (not placeholder)
3. /llms/index.md includes link to /llms/gear-insights.md
4. /api/sitemap.xml includes /llms/gear-insights.md URL

## Done
- [x] public/llms/gear-insights.md created — 1704 words (min 300 ✅)
- [x] 6 drum brands with >2 drummers: Pearl 30%, Tama 28%, Sonor 11%, DW 8%, ddrum 7%, Mapex 5% ✅
- [x] 4 cymbal brands: Zildjian 33%, Sabian 28%, Paiste 23%, Meinl 16% ✅
- [x] 6 pedal brands with >2 drummers: DW 31%, Tama 30%, Pearl 30%, Axis 5%, Mapex 5%, Gibraltar 5% ✅
- [x] Each brand entry cites 2+ named drummers with /drummer/<slug> links ✅
- [x] Link in /llms/index.md (LLM Resources table, line 32) ✅
- [x] /llms/gear-insights.md in api/sitemap.js (line 508) ✅
- [x] scripts/generate-llms-gear-insights.cjs passes node --check ✅
- [x] Already shipped in main via PR #1539 (commit 64aa83b)
title: SEO: /llms/gear-insights.md — brand usage % data for AI citation
